items.summary: US resumes strikes on Iran, reinstates Hormuz naval blockade + 20% transit toll; Brent nears $85
OPEC trims 2026 global oil demand growth forecast to 800k bpd, citing softer non-OPEC demand
US natgas slips to 2-month low near $2.89 as Freeport LNG maintenance cuts export demand
June US CPI cools to 3.5% YoY, largest MoM drop since 2020; Fed-hold odds rise to 66%, metals jump
10Y Treasury yield holds near 2-month high ~4.62% as oil-driven inflation risk offsets rate-cut hopes
